text.title: business-process-analysis Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for business-process-analysis as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Ideal-vs-actual gap: LLMs amplify "documenting the ideal" by smoothing messy interviews into tidy linear diagrams.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Workarounds (the actual value) get edited out. Force verbatim quotes for anomalies; never paraphrase exceptions.

failure-mode.description: No native BPMN renderer: Methodology shows arrow-art but produces no machine-readable artifact.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without BPMN 2.0 XML you cannot diff, validate, or feed downstream tools (Camunda, Signavio).

failure-mode.description: Value-classification subjectivity: VA/BN/NVA labels swing with prompt wording; runs disagree in 20-30% of rows.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Needs a fixed rubric with examples or human review.

failure-mode.description: Metrics fabrication: "Cycle time" and "error rate" tables invite hallucinated numbers when no data source supplied.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hard rule: blank or "Data not available" if source absent.

failure-mode.description: Single-pool bias: LLMs collapse multi-actor swimlanes (typical for B2B processes) into linear flows.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Needs extra prompting to maintain handoffs. Force swimlane requirement.

failure-mode.description: Future-state hand-waving: "Auto-approve orders < $1000" is easy to write, hard to scope.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without an explicit "what changes in which system" column, future-state diagrams are unactionable.

failure-mode.description: Improvement pattern overuse: LLMs default to "automate" for everything.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Eliminate/simplify (cheaper, faster wins) get under-recommended.

failure-mode.description: Not for event-driven systems: BPMN sequence flows model deterministic step-by-step work.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Event-heavy async systems (queues, webhooks, sagas) need event storming or BPMN choreography, not basic process flows.

failure-mode.description: Linear-flow bias: LLMs collapse parallel branches into sequential steps.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pre-prompt: "Identify all gateways (XOR/OR/AND); never default to linear flow."

failure-mode.description: Lost actors: Single-pool diagrams lose handoffs.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force swimlane requirement: every step must have an actor column; if blank → reject.

failure-mode.description: Hallucinated systems: Agent invents "ERP" or "CRM" generically.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Constrain: "Use only system names that appear verbatim in the evidence."

failure-mode.description: Soft metrics: Agent fills cycle-time with "30 min (estimated)".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hard-block: "If metric not directly cited, write Data not available."

failure-mode.description: VA/BN/NVA drift between runs: Same input, different labels on re-run.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Mitigate with fixed rubric + temperature 0 + determinism check (run twice, compare).

failure-mode.description: Future-state shopping list: Agent emits 30 improvements with no prioritization.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Cap at 5 + require effort/benefit scores.

failure-mode.description: Workaround erasure: "we email Jane because system broken" rewritten as "data transferred to Jane".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force verbatim quotes for anomalies; agent must not paraphrase exceptions.

failure-mode.description: PII / credential leak: SOPs and tickets contain customer data, API keys, internal URLs.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Run password-scrubber-agent on raw evidence before passing to any LLM tool.

failure-mode.description: BPMN dialect mismatch: Output looks like BPMN but fails 2.0 XML validation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always validate with pm4py.write_bpmn() or bpmn-validate before archiving.

failure-mode.description: Loop-mining false positives: pm4py discovers loops where real process has retries on transient errors.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Filter event logs by terminal states before mining.

failure-mode.description: Token blow-up at synthesis: 200-step retail process exceeds context.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Chunk by sub-process (one BPMN call activity per chunk) and stitch in orchestrator pass.

failure-mode.description: Cron-mode interactivity: Validate stage requires humans but runs headless.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Freeze at stage 4 and emit review packet — never auto-advance without approval.

failure-mode.description: Documenting the ideal process: agent smooths over interview transcripts into a tidy linear diagram. Workarounds disappear.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Workarounds are the actual process. They carry the real value and the real waste. Verbatim quotes for any anomaly; the agent is forbidden from paraphrasing them as normal steps.

failure-mode.description: Hallucinated metrics: cycle-time cells filled with "30 min (estimated)" when no data source is supplied.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Estimated metrics anchor decisions to fabricated baselines. Hard-block: "Data not available" if not directly cited in the evidence.

failure-mode.description: Single-pool bias: LLMs collapse parallel branches into sequential steps and lose multi-actor swimlanes.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Handoffs between actors are where bottlenecks occur. Pre-prompt: "Identify all gateways (XOR/OR/AND); never default to a linear flow. Every step must have an actor column."

failure-mode.description: Future-state shopping list: agent emits 30 improvements with no prioritization or effort scores.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Cap at 5 improvements; require effort/benefit scores ranked by NVA×frequency. A list without ranking forces BA work the agent should have done.

failure-mode.description: Workaround erasure: "we email Jane because the system is broken" rewritten as "data is transferred to the systems team".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The workaround is the finding. Force verbatim quotes for any anomaly. The agent must not paraphrase exceptions into normal-looking steps.

failure-mode.description: BPMN output that looks like valid XML but fails Camunda/pm4py validation on import.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always validate BPMN 2.0 XML with pm4py.write_bpmn() or bpmn-validate before archiving. Invalid BPMN cannot be executed, diffed, or imported into downstream tools.

failure-mode.description: Hallucinated system names: agent invents "ERP" or "CRM" generically when evidence mentions specific systems.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Constrain: "Use only system names that appear verbatim in the evidence." Generic names make the process map non-actionable for system-specific redesign.
